question: List the names of all product categories, sorted alphabetically.
reference_sql: SELECT name FROM categories ORDER BY name

question: How many orders were cancelled?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'cancelled'

question: Which country has the most customers?
reference_sql: SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS n FROM customers GROUP BY country ORDER BY n DESC, country LIMIT 1

question: What are the top 5 best-selling products by units sold? Break ties alphabetically by product name.
reference_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY units DESC, p.name LIMIT 5

question: How much revenue (money actually collected) did we get from the electronics category?
reference_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN payments pay ON pay.order_id = o.id WHERE c.name = 'electronics' AND pay.status = 'completed'

question: What is the total revenue from completed payments in 2025?
reference_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) FROM payments WHERE status = 'completed' AND strftime('%Y', paid_at) = '2025'

question: Which 3 customers paid the most in 2025 via completed payments? Return name and total paid.
reference_sql: SELECT c.name, ROUND(SUM(p.amount), 2) AS total FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN payments p ON p.order_id = o.id WHERE p.status = 'completed' AND strftime('%Y', p.paid_at) = '2025' GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY total DESC, c.name LIMIT 3

question: What is the most popular payment method by number of completed payments?
reference_sql: SELECT method, COUNT(*) AS n FROM payments WHERE status = 'completed' GROUP BY method ORDER BY n DESC, method LIMIT 1

question: How many orders are still pending?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending'

question: Which products have less than 20 units in stock? Return name and stock.
reference_sql: SELECT name, stock FROM products WHERE stock < 20 ORDER BY stock, name

question: What was the total amount refunded across all refunded payments?
reference_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount), 2) FROM payments WHERE status = 'refunded'

question: How much revenue per category was collected from completed payments? Return category and revenue, sorted by revenue desc.
reference_sql: SELECT c.name, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN payments pay ON pay.order_id = o.id WHERE pay.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY revenue DESC, c.name

question: What is the average order value (sum of order items per order) across delivered orders?
reference_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(t.order_total), 2) FROM (SELECT o.id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS order_total FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'delivered' GROUP BY o.id) AS t

question: How many distinct customers placed at least one delivered order?
reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) FROM orders WHERE status = 'delivered'
